---
title: "Bauke Brenninkmeijer"
subtitle: "Research Engineer · AI Systems · Open Source"
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: trestles
  image: profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/bauke-brenninkmeijer-40143310b/
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/Baukebrenninkmeijer
listing:
  - id: recent-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    categories: cloud
    filter-ui: true
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    page-size: 9
    max-description-length: 175
    feed:
      items: 10
      type: full
      title: "Bauke Brenninkmeijer's Blog"
page-layout: full
---

::: {#hero-heading}

I'm a Research Engineer at [orq.ai](https://orq.ai), working on AI agent infrastructure, LLM evaluation, and production AI systems. Previously built ML systems at ABN AMRO and ING.

I write about applied AI, MLOps, and the things I learn along the way.

:::

## Recent Posts

::: {#recent-posts}
:::
